goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet' and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should be in the type of 'hotel'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get entrance fee and phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to include internet and doesn't need to have free parking
The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the type of hotel
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Make sure you get star of the hotel
